---
description: Canonical verbatim content for a repository's CONTRIBUTING.md.
applyTo: 'CONTRIBUTING.md'
---
# CONTRIBUTING.md — Canonical Content

`CONTRIBUTING.md` is identical across every repo in this organization. When creating or updating, replace the file content with the following **verbatim** text (no additions, no per-repo customisation):

```markdown
# CONTRIBUTING

This is a personal project which I use to learn and apply new tools, technologies, approaches and generally to learn through. As such I am not looking for any direct contributions however I am always open to constructive feedback, feature requests and issues being raised.
```

## Compliance check

A `CONTRIBUTING.md` is compliant when its full content matches the block above byte-for-byte (a single trailing newline is acceptable). Any deviation should be replaced.
